★ I blame it on tiktok because I've been haunted by this song for weeks now and the first thought I had was: "uhm, yes, this is Dazai. I̶'̶m̶ ̶t̶o̶t̶a̶l̶l̶y̶ ̶n̶o̶t̶ ̶w̶r̶i̶t̶i̶n̶g̶ ̶a̶b̶o̶u̶t̶ ̶i̶t̶". But then bsd editors started to do edits too and yeah... they convinced me!
